ideation: This sequence will show the robot mimicking a moose's head with its arms.  The arms will extend outward to represent antlers. Because the robot has no elbows, the arms will create a simplified antler shape. The movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the moose's generally calm demeanor. Frame 1 shows the arms at rest. Frame 2 begins the extension of the arms outward. Frame 3 shows the arms fully extended. Frame 4 brings the arms slightly down and inward. Frame 5 returns the arms to rest.

frames.beat: arms hang at rest, a moose's calm stance
arms begin to extend outward like antlers
arms reach fully out, forming wide antlers
antlers retract, returning to a resting state
